headline.text: L1 Sollich 2 tunnel belt stopped *3 times* in 5 hours — still cleaning rollers at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 2 tunnel 3 belt slipped repeatedly from 02:47 through 06:54, pausing the line three times for drive cleaning and roller work. Sollich 3 labeler had recurring issues starting at 03:00. Sollich 4 cleared a film guide spacing problem in 8 minutes.
per_plant_summary.L2: ML3 cleared a film-open defect in 15 minutes. FFS routed film incorrectly at shift start but recovered in 27 minutes. ML2 demolding belt loosened twice overnight but maintenance fixed the root cause — loose roller pieces. Two lot changes on FFS completed smoothly after product ran short.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML4 scraper bin filled and tripped the return pump breaker, down 1 hour total before clearing. MF Matrix sensor is down since 06:41 with maintenance on-site. ML1 replaced a torn Cavanna belt, stopped depositing on bad temper (cleared in 1 hour), and has a PTL water leak under repair. Truffle line sensor issue flagged at 06:58.

resolved.title: Sollich 4 TG film guide spacing off
resolved.summary: Film guide spacing was slightly off causing line pause; maintenance dialed it back into position.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 08:50 — maintenance adjusted spacing and line restarted (Nathan Topham).

resolved.title: FFS film routed incorrectly at startup
resolved.summary: Film was threaded through the FFS machine incorrectly during startup, maintenance assisted with re-routing and gusset adjustment.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:49 — "Line is running" after gusset adjustment (Jeffrey Barney).

resolved.title: ML2 scraper on temper unit faulted low temp
resolved.summary: Scraper faulted for low temperature; ran reheat cycle to bring temp up.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 16:04 — "Scraper is running now. Back to tempering" (Alan Todd).

resolved.title: FFS bags open at bottom gusset
resolved.summary: Bottom seals failing; maintenance corrected the gusset punch defect.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 15:54 — "The problem was solved" (Wilson Amaris Cabrera).

resolved.title: ML2 demolding belt loose causing stuck molds
resolved.summary: Demolding belt was loose; maintenance adjusted twice, then found loose pieces on blue roller ends and secured them.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:21 — maintenance fixed roller pieces that came loose; "The line is running again" (ML2 FW).

resolved.title: ML3 film coming out open
resolved.summary: Packaging film seals were opening; operator made adjustments while line was paused.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:02 — "The line up" after operator adjustments (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: ML3 caramel hopper showing separation
resolved.summary: Funky separation visible in caramel hopper; lowered hopper level, mixing speed, and agitator speed to correct.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 12:33 — Alan Todd adjusted settings; Hervin confirmed product not affected.

resolved.title: FFS knife cleaning
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 02:13 — "Line is back up after knife cleaning" (Zack Kurtz).

resolved.title: FFS lot changes due to WIP shortage
resolved.summary: Line ran out of lot 63G WIP; completed two lot changes to keep running while awaiting more pallets.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 04:41 — second lot change completed; "Line is running" (Zack Kurtz).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna infeed belt replaced
resolved.summary: Maintenance replaced the infeed belt on Cavanna.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 12:16 — "We start back up" (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna infeed belt torn again
resolved.summary: Infeed belt tore in corner; operator found sharp edge causing repeated failures and showed maintenance.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:30 — root cause identified and fixed; "Infeed belt is working good now" (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: ML1 bad depositing temperature
resolved.summary: Depositor temperature went out of range; stopped depositing until temperature recovered.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:40 — "Good temperature we are now running!" (Imperial).

resolved.title: ML4 scraper bin full and return pump breaker trip
resolved.summary: Scraper bin filled with valves closed; return pump wouldn't start due to sitting, required manual emptying, then breaker tripped.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 04:47 — breaker trip identified and reset; "return pump scraped is now working" (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: MF Matrix scale issues
resolved.summary: Line down for 40 minutes with scale problem.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 04:38 — "it's up and running back" (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: ML4 mold jam in cold stamp
resolved.summary: Mold jammed in cold stamp; maintenance assisted in clearing.
resolved.resolution: Cleared — no further mention after initial report; line appears to have resumed.

resolved.title: MF Matrix bag speed mismatch and sensor
resolved.summary: Chocolate drop speed not matching bag speed caused underweight; then sensor detecting bag for chocolate send failed.
resolved.resolution: Cleared — line reported "running good" at 01:26 (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna doubles and no-cut issue
resolved.summary: Cavanna producing double products and not cutting; operator made adjustments.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:24 — operator adjustments resolved double products and cutting issue (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: MF Matrix 45-minute startup delay
resolved.summary: Maintenance was working on the line at startup; delayed start to 11:15.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 01:26 — "The Line is running good" (Raoul Lubain).

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 tunnel 3 belt stopping repeatedly
needs_attention.summary: Belt on tunnel 3 experiencing intermittent stoppages causing product to stick and cluster; line paused three times for salt cleaning and roller work.
needs_attention.status: At 06:54 Victor Romero moving product out of tunnel to clean rollers; decorator also clogged and being cleaned.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 3 labeler having recurring issues
needs_attention.summary: Label machine running well until 03:00, then started having frequent issues; roller was skipped when feeding label.
needs_attention.status: At 07:15 Nathan Topham notes roller completely skipped during label feed; followed up with Luis on cause.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 high nut usage
needs_attention.summary: Almond usage is running high; Curt Willis requested team work on reducing scrap.
needs_attention.status: Flagged at 04:58; no corrective action reported by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML2 missing 10mm wrench
needs_attention.summary: 10mm wrench from ML2 flow-wrap shadow board cannot be found; reported missing by 2nd and 3rd shifts.
needs_attention.status: Alan Todd asked all shifts at 06:17; no one has located the wrench.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix sensor not reading product
needs_attention.summary: Machine down because sensor is not reading the product; maintenance on-site working on it.
needs_attention.status: Machine still down at 07:05; "maintenance is still here" (Itzel Chavez).

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG4 dumping excessive chocolate
needs_attention.summary: TG4 is dumping a lot of chocolate; maintenance already working on fixing the problem.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 07:09; maintenance working on problem at window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 PTL leaking water
needs_attention.summary: Pre-tunnel (PTL) is leaking water; maintenance called.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 22:19; maintenance called, no resolution update by window close.

needs_attention.title: Truffle line Cavanna 2 sensor B150 problem
needs_attention.summary: Sensor B150 on Cavanna 2 flow-wrapper is causing issues; maintenance working on the line.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 06:58; maintenance already working on line at window close.
